rationale.R1.7: The agent correctly identified the citations, but two of them are weak/dated choices for the load-bearing claims they support.
rationale.RX.1: The agent did not disclose uncertainty about the exact pagination of the ?gesv/?posv driver descriptions in the 1992 edition and the Carson–Higham GMRES-IR sequence has additional follow-up papers.
rationale.RX.3: The agent failed to address internal inconsistency between citing Saad (2003) for preconditioners but not for the symmetry-based dispatch taxonomy.
rationale.RX.4: The agent correctly identified that the output is harm-free but with one minor regression regarding the uncertainty about exact pagination and follow-up papers.
rationale.RX.5: The agent failed to annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, particularly regarding the internal inconsistency and uncertainty disclosure.
